content.cn_text: 杰弗里:晚上好，我是杰弗里·米勒，来自诺丁汉大学学生会。
content.en_text: GEOFFREY: Good evening, I'm Geoffrey Miller, from the University of Nottingham Student Union.

content.cn_text: 在本周的免费课程中，卡洛斯·加西亚将告诉我们校园周围的安全问题。
content.en_text: And in this week's free class, Carlos Garcia is going to tell us about safety around campus.

content.cn_text: 交给你了，卡洛斯。
content.en_text: Over to you, Carlos.

content.cn_text: 卡洛斯:谢谢你，杰弗里。
content.en_text: CARLOS: Thank you, Geoffrey.

content.cn_text: 感谢大家今天的出席。同时，我要感谢大学学生会组织这次讲座。
content.en_text: And thank you for all of your attendance today.Also, I would like to thank the student union here at the university for organising this lecture.

content.cn_text: 作为警察部门的一员，我已经为诺丁汉市服务和保护了20多年。
content.en_text: Well, I have been serving and protecting the city of Nottingham for over 20 years now as a member of the police department.

content.cn_text: 有谁知道校园里最常见的犯罪类型是什么吗?
content.en_text: Does anyone know what type of crime is the most prevalent on campus?

content.cn_text: 我听到有人说毒品和酒精——这其实不是什么大问题。
content.en_text: I heard someone say drugs and alcohol - that actually isn't too much of an issue.

content.cn_text: 暴力吗?
content.en_text: Violence?

content.cn_text: 不。
content.en_text: Nope.

content.cn_text: 实际上，我们最担心的是盗窃。
content.en_text: Actually, the biggest thing we worry about here is theft.

content.cn_text: 诺丁汉大学校园里的犯罪性质与周围地区大不相同。
content.en_text: The nature of crime on Nottingham's campus is quite different from that of the surrounding areas.

content.cn_text: 整个东米德兰兹的犯罪率很难控制。
content.en_text: Crime rates across the East Midlands are very difficult to control.

content.cn_text: 我们希望看到这一比率在本日历年保持不变，但在过去三年里，它一直在稳步上升。
content.en_text: We would like to see the rate stay the same for this calendar year, but it has been increasing steadily over the past three years.

content.cn_text: 然而，在校园里，我很高兴地说，今年总体犯罪率下降了。
content.en_text: On campus, however, I'm happy to say that the overall crime rate has fallen this year.

content.cn_text: 如果你看过媒体上极度夸张的报道，你就不会这么想了。
content.en_text: You wouldn't think so if you have seen the extremely exaggerated stories in the media.

content.cn_text: 媒体什么也没做，只引起了人们对我们地区犯罪的更多关注。
content.en_text: The media has done nothing but cause more concern about crime in our area.

content.cn_text: 即使你今天看到的犯罪节目也有点牵强，但至少观众知道它们不是真实的事件。
content.en_text: Even the crime shows you see today are a little bit farfetched, but at least viewers know they are not real events.

content.cn_text: 我们真的希望看到更多真实的新闻报道，这样公众就能对我们社会的安全水平有一个理性的认识。
content.en_text: We would really like to see more factual news articles out there so the public can have a rational sense of the safety level of our society.

content.cn_text: 好了，让我们来看看当你看到犯罪时该怎么做。
content.en_text: OK, let's move on to what to do when you see a crime.

content.cn_text: 如果可能的话，不要卷入其中，也不要以引人注目的方式逃跑，以免引起过多的注意。
content.en_text: Do not get involved if at all possible, and do not draw too much attention to yourself by running away in a conspicuous manner.

content.cn_text: 虽然很有可能(也很有希望)你不会经历这种情况，但如果你被抢劫了，请不要试图反抗。
content.en_text: Though most likely (and hopefully) you will not have to experience this situation, if you are being mugged please do not try to resist.

content.cn_text: 相反，要顺从，并在事件发生后寻求帮助。
content.en_text: Instead, be compliant and, seek help after the incident.

content.cn_text: 就像我说的，虽然你不太可能发现自己身处犯罪之中，但重要的是要做好准备，以防万一。
content.en_text: Like I said, though, it is highly unlikely that you will find yourself amidst a crime, but it is important to be prepared should it ever happen.

content.cn_text: 我们发现教育学生和员工采取正确的预防措施是提高你的安全的最好方法。记住，当你深夜外出时要聪明，避开任何看起来可疑的地方或人。
content.en_text: We find that educating students and staff on the correct precautions to take is the best way to increase your safety.Just remember to be smart when you're out late at night, and avoid any area or person that looks suspicious.

content.cn_text: 我知道这听起来很明显，但我必须强调这一点。
content.en_text: I know it sounds obvious, but I cannot stress this enough.

content.cn_text: 随身携带手机也不是个坏主意，但要小心。
content.en_text: It is also not a bad idea to have your mobile phone with you at all times, but be careful.

content.cn_text: 如果你在回家的路上用智能手机聊天，你就是小偷的主要目标。
content.en_text: If you are chatting on your smart phone on your way home, you are a prime target for thieves.

content.cn_text: 我想请大家举手——有多少人在晚上10点后离开公司或图书馆回家?
content.en_text: I'd like to see a show of hands - how many people have left work or the library after 10 p.m. to go home before?

content.cn_text: 很多人，对吧?
content.en_text: A lot of you, right?

content.cn_text: 如果你必须在深夜回家，请不要独自走回家。
content.en_text: If you do have to go home late at night, please don't walk home alone.

content.cn_text: 经常会有人和你走同一条路
content.en_text: More often than not there is someone there that will be walking the same direction as you

content.cn_text: 在某个时刻。
content.en_text: at some point.

content.cn_text: 和朋友或同事一起步行回家。
content.en_text: Walk home with a friend or coworker.

content.cn_text: 即使你必须用手机打电话给附近的人陪你一起走，和别人一起走回家总是更安全的。
content.en_text: Even if you must use your phone to call someone that is nearby to walk with you, it is always safer to walk home with someone.

content.cn_text: 所以当你走回家的时候，你可能会觉得用一些自卫手段更舒服，比如胡椒喷雾。
content.en_text: So when you're walking home, you may feel more comfortable with some sort of self-defense, such as pepper spray.

content.cn_text: 现在，你自己决定要不要携带这样的东西。
content.en_text: Now, it's your call whether you want to carry something like this or not.

content.cn_text: 然而，我绝对建议不要携带刀或任何其他攻击性武器。
content.en_text: However, I absolutely advise against carrying a knife or any other offensive weapon.

content.cn_text: 如果你没有武装，它们往往会被用来对付你，把你自己置于更危险的境地。
content.en_text: All too often they can be used against you if you are disarmed,putting yourself in more danger.

content.cn_text: 对于所有感兴趣的人，娱乐中心每周四晚上为所有学生提供免费的自卫课。
content.en_text: For all those interested, the recreation centre offers a free self-defense class to all students every Thursday evening.

content.cn_text: 虽然很明显，入门级的自卫课程可能不会让你像普通的超级英雄那样对抗恶棍，但它有时确实会派上用场。
content.en_text: While obviously an introductory self-defense class may not equip you to fight off villains like a regular superhero, it does come in handy sometimes.

content.cn_text: 上了防身课后，你肯定会更加意识到可能存在的危险以及如何应对它们。
content.en_text: After taking a self-defense class, you will surely be more aware of possible dangers and how to deal with them.

content.cn_text: 希望现在你对校园犯罪的性质有了更全面的了解，以及如何避免成为受害者。
content.en_text: So hopefully now you have a more complete understanding of the nature of crimes committed on your campus, and how to avoid being a victim.

content.cn_text: 我知道诺丁汉大学的大多数学生都不是犯罪分子，但请记住，没有墙之类的屏障可以把非学生挡在外面。
content.en_text: I know most students at the University of Nottingham are not the criminal types, but remember that there is no barrier like a wall or something keeping non-students out.

content.cn_text: 没有军队保护边界，我怀疑没有人希望这样。
content.en_text: There is no army force securing the borders, and I doubt anyone wants it that way.

content.cn_text: 校园通常是一个安全的地方，但偶尔也会发生小犯罪。
content.en_text: The campus is generally a safe place,but it is not immune to small crimes once in a while.

content.cn_text: 好吧。
content.en_text: Alright.

content.cn_text: 这就是我今天要说的。
content.en_text: That's all I have to say for today.

content.cn_text: 保持安全!
content.en_text: Stay safe!

groups.desc:
Questions 11-20
Choose the correct letter, A, B or C.

items.title: The lecture was organised by
items.analysis: 正确答案是B（University of Nottingham Students' Union），因为在听力开头，Geoffrey Miller明确表示他来自诺丁汉大学学生会（University of Nottingham Student Union）。而且，他介绍了本周的免费课程，这暗示了学生会是该讲座的组织者。这个信息直接回答了题目中关于讲座组织者的问题。

items.title: The majority of crime on campus is
items.analysis: 这道题的正确答案是盗窃（theft），因为演讲者明确指出这是校园里最普遍的犯罪类型。演讲者首先提出了一个问题，询问哪种犯罪在校园最普遍，然后否定了毒品、酒精和暴力这些选项，最后强调盗窃是最大的问题。使用"Actually"（实际上）这个词进一步突出了这一点的重要性，表明这可能与人们的普遍认知不同。

items.title: The campus crime rate has_____so far this year.
items.analysis: 文中明确指出校园整体犯罪率今年下降了。"fallen"是"decreased"的同义词，因此B选项"decreased"是正确答案。此外，说话人使用"I'm happy to say"表达了对这一变化的积极态度，进一步印证了犯罪率的下降。

items.title: Why is there added concern about crime?
items.analysis: 文中明确指出媒体报道是引起更多犯罪担忧的原因。讲话者强调媒体的报道极度夸张，这导致人们对犯罪问题产生了不必要的额外担忧。相比之下，其他选项要么不是造成担忧的原因，要么是被建议用来减少担忧的方法。因此，媒体的夸大报道是引起人们对犯罪更多担忧的主要原因。

items.title: Carlos says if you are the victim of a crime, you should
items.analysis: 文中明确指出，当遇到犯罪事件时，不应该反抗，而应该顺从并在事件发生后寻求帮助。这与选项C "seek help"直接对应，因此C是正确答案。演讲者强调了在犯罪发生时保持冷静和安全的重要性，而不是采取可能增加危险的行动。

items.title: What is the primary method for increasing safety?

options.title: A
options.content: informing students and staff of safety precautions

options.title: B
options.content: offering free self-defense courses to students

options.title: C
options.content: reminding students to carry a mobile phone at all times

items.analysis: 文中明确指出，教育学生和教职员工采取正确的预防措施是提高安全性的最佳方法。这直接对应了题目中询问的"提高安全性的主要方法"。讲者使用"the best way"这一表述，强调了这种方法的重要性和有效性，因此选择A选项"informing students and staff of safety precautions"是正确的。

items.title: If a student must work late, it is most important to

options.title: A
options.content: not return home until the morning.

items.analysis: 文中明确指出，如果必须在深夜回家，最重要的是不要独自步行，而应该与朋友或同事同行。这直接对应了选项B。作者强调了与他人同行的重要性，认为这是最安全的做法，因此B是最符合题意的答案。

items.title: It is dangerous to
items.analysis: 文中明确指出携带刀具是危险的行为。讲者强烈建议不要携带刀具或其他攻击性武器，并解释说这些武器可能会被用来对付携带者自己，从而增加危险。这直接回答了题目中询问的危险行为，因此B选项是正确答案。

items.title: Students who complete a self-defense course are
items.analysis: 文中明确指出，参加自卫课程后，学生会"more aware of possible dangers"（更加意识到可能的危险）。这直接对应了选项A "more aware of dangers"。原文使用了"surely"（肯定）一词，强调了这种意识的增强是自卫课程的确定结果，而不是推测或可能性。因此，A选项是最准确的答案。

items.title: A university is
items.analysis: 文中明确指出"There is no barrier like a wall or something keeping non-students out"，这直接对应了选项A"not surrounded by walls"。同时，文中提到校园没有军队保卫，也不是完全安全的，排除了选项B和C。因此，A是正确答案。
